summary: Introduce hand-authored SQLite tables for novel-feature state: rates_snapshots, quota_snapshots, watchlist, conversions_log. Each comes with typed Insert helpers and an idempotent EnsureExrateTables bootstrap.
reason: The four novel-feature data classes have no spec source; the generator's typed table emission only covers spec resources. Without these tables, history-cache, drift, watch, quota burn, and log show have no persistence layer. Inserts hold the store writeMu and are transactional so concurrent novel commands can't corrupt the store.
validated_outcome: All four tables created on first novel-feature invocation; sync-rates writes ~166 rate snapshots per USD-base sync; watch/log/drift round-trip correctly; go test ./internal/store passes.
